assets.name: Primary lockup
assets.description: The Stack (five torn strips, one per person) above the ALTROCKS wordmark. Use on paper or light backgrounds; never outline or shadow the mark.

assets.name: App icon / mark
assets.description: The Stack alone on a paper tile for avatars, favicons, and app tiles. Use where the name already appears.

assets.name: Torn Band
assets.description: Secondary mark — a ripped coral strip with ALTROCKS knocked out in paper. Use for anything wide: totes, headers, signage, banners.
